body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-11719", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "An authenticated authorization bypass vulnerability exists in MCP Toolbox for Databases due to missing scope enforcement across older protocol handlers.\n\nWhile the 2025-11-25 protocol version handler correctly enforces per-tool restrictions defined by scopesRequired, older supported protocol versions (2025-06-18, 2025-03-26, and 2024-11-05) omit this check. An authenticated client with low-privilege tokens (e.g., read) can bypass the intended per-tool scope restrictions and execute high-privilege tools (e.g., admin) simply by specifying an older protocol version in the MCP-Protocol-Version header, or by omitting the header entirely (which causes the server to default to the vulnerable 2024-11-05 handler).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0015, "percentile": 0.04555}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5gf6-gc35-xjpc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T17:00:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5gf6-gc35-xjpc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5gf6-gc35-xjpc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-11719"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T14:17:20Z", "published_at": "2026-06-18T15:32:02Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11719", "https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox/pull/3049", "https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox/pull/3335", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5gf6-gc35-xjpc"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox", "summary": "MCP Toolbox for Databases: authenticated authorization bypass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T17:00:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5gf6-gc35-xjpc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.4.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.4.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MCP Toolbox for Databases: authenticated authorization bypass
